name: Double Click Exit
description: Prevents accidental exits by requiring a double click on the exit button.

enable-double-click.name: Enable Double Click
enable-double-click.description: Toggle the double click requirement on or off.

plat-only.name: Platformer Only
plat-only.description: If enabled, the mod will only work in platformer levels.

show-notification.name: Show Notification
show-notification.description: Show a visual message on the first click.

custom-text.name: Custom Message
custom-text.description: The text that appears when you click the exit button once.

click-speed.name: Click Speed (ms)
click-speed.description: The maximum time allowed between clicks (0 to 1000 milliseconds).
